feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: This African invention is surprisingly genius!
entry.content: This African invention is surprisingly genius!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: So this shit is why people hate ubisoft game HOLY FUCK
entry.content: I am not doing this shit. Do i have to do it to finish the main quest??? Who the fuck enjoys doing the exact same repetitive shit in every single area of the map??? Are you serious???? Like 20 towers to climb to see a short cinematic of the camera spinning around to unlock "save ctiizen" "pick pocket"? WHAT THE FUCK?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: For about 15 years now, I've operated under a schizo theory: that AI will make m…
entry.content: For about 15 years now, I've operated under a schizo theory: that AI will make music that is not just more popular than human-made music but which is (in many cases) objectively and omnisubjectively far better than the best music made by the greatest human musicians in history. Such music may not be "objectively" "better" across literally every single metric; knowing something was made by a human will impart more emotional value, and some listeners may forever highly prioritize that. Just, as pu

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I haven't posted here in a long time, but here's my car atm. It's a 2012 370Z. S…
entry.content: I haven't posted here in a long time, but here's my car atm. It's a 2012 370Z. So far I've got: -Z1 csc bypass kit -Z1 lightweight flywheel and race clutch -Vortech V3 supercharger -Z1 ported upper and lower intake manifold -Deastchwerks 1400cc injectors -Z1 return fuel system with billet rails -Walbro 525lph fuel pump -ac delete pulley -Z1 upgraded coil packs -Berk test pipes -ARK Grip dual exhaust (came with the car) -Setrab 34 row oil cooler -Koyorad radiator -AST 6 point rollcage -momo monte

entry.title: /int/ International: It's genuinely insane how selfish immigrants are. You are literally dooming your…
entry.content: It's genuinely insane how selfish immigrants are. You are literally dooming your brown/yellow child into a life of social exclusion, where the native light colored Aryans will make fun of them for looking like poop, where they'll get bullied at school, where they'll be much less romantically successful with women as adults. My people will be associated with doordashing, massage parlors, fruit picking, welfare leeches. And all for what? So my parents could live in a bigger house and drive an SUV?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I'm learning Chinese and was wondering if you could recommend some Chinese langu…
entry.content: I'm learning Chinese and was wondering if you could recommend some Chinese language artists to try? At the moment I am listening to 王菲 but it's quite entry-level. From experiance I've found that I can get the overall speaking and cadence down very quickly by listening to songs in the language. It obviously also helps with picking out colloquial terms and providing some exposure to the culture that is different to picking up a simple-language book or newspaper. Obviously with Chinese that's very

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Y'know, when the dotcom bubble popped, the market fully recovered after like 15 …
entry.content: Y'know, when the dotcom bubble popped, the market fully recovered after like 15 years, but in that time, the internet basically became fully integrated into our daily lives. Even if the AI bubble pops this year, it's not going anywhere. The question is what will AI look like a decade from now?

entry.title: /int/ International: I am a non-white who thinks we must save Europa. The world is simply more intere…
entry.content: I am a non-white who thinks we must save Europa. The world is simply more interesting that way, when you can go to Japan, China, India, Africa, Arabia, and see a land full of Japanese, Chinese, Indians, Africans, Arabians. What’s the fun in making every country look the exact same? We already have the New World for that. White people should have their own countries too.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /opt/ Omnipotent Pervert Thread #2
entry.content: Back by popular demand. You've been given godlike powers despite lacking any qualifications. This could be due to genetic mutation, eldritch intervention, a glitch in reality or whatever. I want to know how you plan to selfishly transform and change the world to be in line with your petty sexual fantasies. Post about the embarrassing horny changes you'd make to humanity and reality. Alternatively, post how you'd cope with another anon's new world order. Nothing is too cringe or spergy to post, b

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I think AR is where consumer tech is heading over the next decade. The Apple Vis…
entry.content: I think AR is where consumer tech is heading over the next decade. The Apple Vision Pro got dismissed because of its insane price, but the technology itself was seriously underrated. Make it smaller, lighter, and affordable, and I think AR glasses become as common as smartphones. And if that happens, Nintendo feels like the company most likely to get it right. People laughed at the DS dual screens, wii motion controls and the fact that switch was a tablet.People keep expecting Nintendo to chase

entry.content: >Sex on the Beach Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >tall, thin, dressed for the desert in loose robe, stillsuit, and low boots. The…
entry.content: >tall, thin, dressed for the desert in loose robe, stillsuit, and low boots. The man's hood was thrown back, its veil hanging to one side, revealing long sandy hair, a sparse beard. The eyes were that fathomless blue-within-blue under thick brows. Remains of dark stains smudged his eye sockets.
